title: Warm up
content: The slide depicts three cities, Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, each associated with a different driving scene. This sets the stage for discussing distinct urban environments and their characteristics.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide introduces the theme of the presentation, focusing on the transformation of China. It suggests the exploration of various cities and their unique developments during this journey.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching city development strategies. It highlights the examination of local features, development strategies, and their positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide outlines specific development strategies for each city. Beijing focuses on integrating technology and tradition, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide emphasizes the varied urban developments seen through the experiences of taxi drivers. It emphasizes each city's unique strategy based on its local features, contributing to the development of an evolving nation.
